title: SETI: searching for coordination signatures
summary: Tarter and Seager reframe SETI: stop listening for intentional radio messages and start looking for the byproducts of intelligence coordinating with physical laws. Human hypothesis + AI pattern detection + physical reality form the three-body search.
source: Ch08 8.2 — Human Search <-> AI Pattern Detection <-> Alien Intelligence Signals (Tarter, Seager)

nodes.label: Human Hypothesis
nodes.description: What coordination patterns to look for

nodes.label: AI Pattern Detection
nodes.description: ML anomaly search over massive datasets

nodes.label: Physical Reality
nodes.description: What is actually in the universe

nodes.label: Alien Coordination Mode
nodes.description: How aliens actually couple to physics

edges.description: Alien mode determines what is emitted
Alien mode shapes which guesses work

identifiability_note: Alien coordination mode (n6) is a latent confounder on both hypothesis and signature; any null result is consistent with 'wrong mode' rather than 'no intelligence'.
